name: small property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual report preparation causes late financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Time-consuming preparation of quarterly financial reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Time-consuming preparation of quarterly financial reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual report preparation causes late financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
